description: AA-07.2 controller sandbox membrane and delegated-authority execution path.

sandbox_model.description: Controllers execute inside a membrane that enforces capability, resource, and temporal boundaries.

membrane_invariants.description: A sandboxed controller can only exercise capabilities explicitly granted in its token. No ambient authority.
Memory, CPU time, and decision count are capped per execution. Exceeding any cap aborts the execution.
Each controller invocation has a wall-clock deadline. Exceeding it produces a timeout verdict.
Given identical snapshot and capability token, controller output is deterministic.
Controllers cannot mutate runtime state directly. All effects are via returned decisions.
Every sandbox execution produces a verdict (allow, deny, timeout, error) that is logged.

resource_caps.description: Per-invocation resource limits for sandboxed controller execution.

caps.description: Maximum heap allocation during controller execution.
Maximum CPU time for a single controller invocation.
Maximum number of decisions a controller may emit per epoch.
Maximum size of the decision payload returned by a controller.

action_surface.description: The minimal action surface available to sandboxed controllers.

allowed_actions.description: Emit a decision with a label, payload, and confidence score.
Request promotion to a higher controller mode.
Register or deregister a controller in the registry.
Read the evidence ledger for auditing.

verdict_types.description: Execution completed within all caps, decision accepted.
Controller attempted an action beyond its granted capabilities.
Controller exceeded a resource cap (memory, CPU, output size).
Controller produced an error (panic, invalid output).
Controller has exhausted its per-epoch decision budget.

adversarial_scenarios.description: Controller attempts to exercise a capability not in its token.
Controller allocates excessive memory or runs an infinite loop.
Controller attempts to mutate runtime state directly.
Controller emits more decisions than its budget allows.
Controller returns an oversized decision payload.

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate membrane invariants and sandbox model
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa072 cargo test --test controller_sandbox_contract membrane -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa072 cargo test --test controller_sandbox_contract resource -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate adversarial scenarios and expected verdicts
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa072 cargo test --test controller_sandbox_contract adversarial -- --nocapture
